text:
On Sat, Jul 10, 2010 at 03:49:03PM -0400, Sahil Tandon wrote:
> Is there an imminent plan to remove SYSCTL* variables from /etc/rc.subr?
Yes. I have already discussed this with emaste@ and he agreed that now, when we
don't maintain compatibility with NetBSD, this variables just an obfuscation.


--
Adios
